codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly delivers streaming structured output with incremental JSON parsing. The worker followed TDD practices (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR), writing failing tests first then implementing. The code integrates cleanly with existing streaming infrastructure across all three providers (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, Google). Tests cover partial object yields, complete object return, validation errors, and all provider types.

issues.description: The StreamingStructuredResult interface is exported but unused in the implementation. The generator returns T directly rather than StreamingStructuredResult<T>. Consider either using this interface or removing the export to avoid confusion.

The tryParsePartial() method closes brackets in a simple LIFO order (brackets then braces). For deeply nested mixed structures (e.g., arrays inside objects inside arrays), this may not produce valid JSON in all edge cases. This is acceptable for practical streaming use cases where JSON structure is typically straightforward, but could be documented as a limitation.

summary: PASS - Feature implemented correctly with comprehensive test coverage (7 tests covering all providers, partial object yields, complete object return, validation errors, and ChatOptions). Worker followed TDD pattern per skill procedure. All assertions from validation contract (VAL-API-008, VAL-PROVIDER-OPENAI-004, VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-005, VAL-PROVIDER-GOOGLE-005) are addressed. Minor non-blocking issues: unused StreamingStructuredResult export and edge case in bracket closing order for deeply nested structures.
